method: point-in-time walk-forward, 5y daily, monthly rebalance, 63-trading-day (3mo) forward horizon
note: Score weights tuned toward factors with positive information coefficient (momentum, strategy backtest). Volatility is reported but not rewarded to avoid overfitting to a high-beta regime. Fundamentals are not point-in-time backtestable with free data and are validated only qualitatively.
